notes:
- Added text transform controls (as requested by @kirimae) because using capslock is too hard apparently
- Improved number inputs with a custom react component w/ stepper controls (up/down buttons)
- Set text animation speed to have a decimal point value (e.g. 1.0) with 0.1 step - because it wasn't clear enough that the value was in seconds
- Renamed form labels to make things easier to know what does what
- Added buttons to the discord, website etc
